name: /standards-monitor --once iteration count is exactly one for testability in CI
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'iterations=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
